creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
It finally succeeded.  I thought it was transient, but it appears that it's just using the FreeBSD cache.  I don't know why it temporarily failed:

=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/Fira_4_1_Version_Report.rtf
Fira_4_1_Version_Report.rtf                             15 kB    0  Bps
===> Fetching all distfiles required by fira-webfont-4.104 for building
===> Fetching all distfiles required by fira-webfont-4.104 for building


There were still tons of failures before that so I think this report is still accurate.  The rtf file is being served by freebsd only.
